title: 一杯手冲，叫醒一座城
style: warm cinematic, soft golden morning light, shallow depth of field, consistent cozy cafe character

scenes.text: 清晨六点，城市还没醒，第一缕光落在窗台。
scenes.image_prompt: An empty wooden cafe windowsill at dawn, a single ceramic cup, first warm sunlight grazing the surface, soft golden morning light, shallow depth of field, cinematic, high detail
scenes.motion_prompt: Slow push-in toward the cup, dust motes drifting in the light, gentle and calm

scenes.text: 热水绕着咖啡粉打圈，香气先一步醒来。
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a gooseneck kettle pouring a thin water stream over fresh coffee grounds in a dripper, blooming foam, steam rising, warm golden light, shallow depth of field, cinematic, high detail
scenes.motion_prompt: Steady macro shot, water spiraling, steam curling upward, smooth slow motion

scenes.text: 第一口下肚，这座城，才算真正开机。
scenes.image_prompt: A person's hands cradling a warm coffee cup by a bright window overlooking a waking city skyline, soft golden morning light, shallow depth of field, cinematic, cozy mood, high detail
scenes.motion_prompt: Gentle pull-back from the cup to reveal the city beyond the window, warm and hopeful
